binds.description: Bind mounts to add to this CT (host share name + target path + optional mp index)

dns_servers.description: List of DNS servers. If empty, dns block is omitted

groups.description: Optional Ansible groups this CT should belong to (e.g., ["docker_hosts", "twingate"])

ssh_key_files.description: List of filesystem paths to public key files; contents will be read and authorized for root.

ssh_keys.description: List of public key lines to authorize for root inside the LXC.
